final_draft: You can finally see where work actually gets stuck, not just where it's assigned. Try Team Analytics Dashboard. #ProductivityInsights #Analytics

final_review.notes: Clean, concise social post. Reads at appropriate level, uses we/you voice implicitly (addressing reader directly), includes the key message verbatim as the opening line, and avoids all banned words, exclamation points, and pressure language. Good channel fit for social.
